candidate_definition_hints.text: [dirvish-git.nvim](https://github.com/brianhuster/vim-dirvish-git.lua) is a plugin for Neovim that provides Gitsigns integration for the builtin [vim-dirvish](https://github.com/justinmk/vim-dirvish) by Justin M. Keyes. Inspired by [vim-dirvish-git](https://github.com/kristijanh…
